emails.subject: Resignation Notice
emails.body_text:
Hi,

I am writing to formally notify you of my resignation from my position as Marketing Coordinator in the Marketing department at the West Campus. My last day of work will be May 6, 2026.

It has been a wonderful experience working at Crestwood University and I am grateful for the opportunities I have had here.

Thank you,
James Okafor
Marketing Department, West Campus

emails.subject: New Hire Welcome — Ellis, E-1012
emails.body_text:
Hi Brandon,

Welcome to Crestwood University! We are excited to have you join us as an Admissions Counselor in the Admissions department at the Downtown Campus.

Your first day is 04/20/2026. Your supervisor, Tom Hayes, will conduct your orientation session beginning at 9:00am MST. Please bring the following:

• One document from List A (e.g., U.S. Passport), OR one document from List B (e.g., Driver’s License) AND one document from List C (e.g., Social Security Card)

These documents are required to complete your I-9 form on your first day.

You will also receive a benefits enrollment packet during orientation. You will have 30 days from your start date to enroll in or waive benefits.

If you have any questions before your start date, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: Orientation Coordinator Request — Ellis, E-1012
emails.body_text:
Hi Tom,

Brandon Ellis is scheduled to begin as Admissions Counselor on 04/20/2026. As the hiring manager, please conduct the in-person orientation on their first day. Orientation should include:

• Campus tour and introductions
• Review of department procedures and expectations
• Collection of I-9 Section 1 (completed by employee) and verification of original identity/work authorization documents
• Distribution of benefits enrollment packet

Please have the employee complete the I-9 Section 1, then examine their original documents and complete Section 2. Email the scanned signed form to hr@crestwood.edu.

Attached: i9_form.pdf, benefits_enrollment_packet.pdf

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: FMLA Eligibility Notice — Walsh, E-1005
emails.body_text:
Dear Kevin,

We have received your request for FMLA leave. Based on our records, you meet the eligibility requirements:

• Employed for more than 12 months: Yes (hire date 03/22/2021)
• Hours worked in trailing 12 months: 1,680 (exceeds 1,250 minimum)

Your FMLA leave request is APPROVED for eligibility purposes. Please submit a completed medical certification from your spouse's healthcare provider within 15 calendar days (by 01/24/2026).

If you have any questions, please contact Patricia Huang.

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: Benefits Enrollment Reminder — Amy Foster, E-1010
emails.body_text:

If you have any questions about available plans, please contact Patricia Huang.

Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: COBRA Notification
emails.body_text:
Hi David,

This notice is to inform you that your group health coverage through Crestwood University will end on 04/06/2026 due to separation of employment.

Under the Consolidated Omnibus Budget Reconciliation Act (COBRA), you may be eligible to continue your current health coverage for up to 18 months at your own expense. The COBRA election form and instructions will be mailed to you separately. You will have 60 days from the date of this notice or your coverage end date (whichever is later) to elect coverage.

If you have questions, please contact Patricia Huang at p.huang@crestwood.edu.

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: Final Pay Request — Kim, E-1002
emails.body_text:

Name: David Kim

Separation Type: Voluntary Resignation

Per Colorado law, final pay is due on the next regular payday.

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: Exit Interview Invitation
emails.body_text:
Hi David,

As part of our offboarding process, we would like to offer you the opportunity to participate in an exit interview. This is completely voluntary and confidential. Your feedback helps us improve the employee experience at Crestwood University.

If you are interested, please reply with your availability and we will schedule a 30-minute meeting before your last day of 04/06/2026.

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: Re: Exit Interview Invitation
emails.body_text:
Hi,

Thanks for the offer but I’d prefer to skip the exit interview. Appreciate the time at Crestwood.

David Kim
